---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case clearly.

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Be specific about API, behavior, and expected outcomes.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives have you considered?

## Impact

Which repositories, users, or workflows would this affect?

## Implementation Ideas (optional)

Any thoughts on how to implement this.

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, discussions, or external references.
